case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. MARTINEZ, JOSE R.

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, JOSE R. SUMMONS ISSUED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $81.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $416.49 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, JOSE R.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, JOSE R. $985.39 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,065.39
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,450.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, JOSE R.

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, ORDER GRANTED BY JUDGE GARCIA; THIS ACTION IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT JUDGMENT OF AUG-18-1994 SET ASIDE
